Birthday Widget Template

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

🎉 Happy Birthday!

Wishing you a sweet and successful week.

If today’s your birthday, you’ve unlocked +10 motivation and +5 patience for assignments 🎈 

      
      <section aria-label="Birthday Celebration"
  style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#202122;line-height:1.45;">

  <div style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#fff7f0;
              padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:14px;">
    <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;font-size:1.2rem;color:#cb4900;">
      Happy Birthday!
    </h2>
    <p style="margin:0;opacity:.9;">
[Enter Birthday Message]
    </p>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:12px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:300px;">

    <svg width="200" height="200" viewBox="0 0 200 200"
      role="img" aria-label="Birthday cake" style="z-index:2;">
      <g>

        <animateTransform
          attributeName="transform"
          type="translate"
          values="0 0; 0 -8; 0 0"
          dur="3s"
          repeatCount="indefinite"/>

        <ellipse cx="100" cy="170" rx="70" ry="10" fill="#e7e7e7" opacity=".6"/>

        <rect x="50" y="110" width="100" height="45" rx="12"
          fill="#ffd6c2" stroke="rgba(203,73,0,0.25)" stroke-width="2"/>

        <rect x="60" y="80" width="80" height="35" rx="10"
          fill="#ffe7dc" stroke="rgba(203,73,0,0.2)" stroke-width="2"/>

      </g>
    </svg>

     <button id="confettiBtn" type="button"
      style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#cb4900;color:#fff;
             padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;z-index:2;">
      Throw Confetti
    </button>

    <p style="max-width:60ch;text-align:center;opacity:.9;margin:0;z-index:2;">
       [Enter Birthday Message]
    </p>

    
    <div id="confettiArea"
      aria-hidden="true"
      style="position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;"></div>
  </div>

  <script>
    (function () {
      const btn = document.getElementById("confettiBtn");
      const area = document.getElementById("confettiArea");

      function makeConfettiPiece(left, delay, duration, color, rotate) {
        const piece = document.createElement("div");
        piece.style.position = "absolute";
        piece.style.top = "-20px";
        piece.style.left = left + "%";
        piece.style.width = "10px";
        piece.style.height = "14px";
        piece.style.background = color;
        piece.style.opacity = "0.95";
        piece.style.transform = "rotate(" + rotate + "deg)";
        piece.style.borderRadius = "2px";
        piece.style.transition = "transform " + duration + "ms linear, top " + duration + "ms linear, opacity " + duration + "ms ease-out";
        piece.style.transitionDelay = delay + "ms";
        area.appendChild(piece);

        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          piece.style.top = "280px";
          piece.style.transform = "translateX(" + ((Math.random() * 80) - 40) + "px) rotate(" + (rotate + 360) + "deg)";
          piece.style.opacity = "0.2";
        });

        setTimeout(() => piece.remove(), duration + delay + 100);
      }

      btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
        const colors = ["#cb4900", "#6aa9ff", "#6bd48c", "#f5c34d", "#ff7aa2", "#a78bfa"];
        for (let i = 0; i < 45; i++) {
          makeConfettiPiece(
            Math.random() * 100,
            Math.random() * 250,
            1800 + Math.random() * 1200,
            colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],
            Math.random() * 180
          );
        }
      });
    })();
  </script>
</section>

← Back to catalog
